context: Tests whether the agent implements redemption and expiration logic with the correct conversion rate, idempotency check, redemption cap, validation guards, expiration query filters, and safe expiration capping — all per the skill's specific values and patterns.

checklist.name: Conversion rate 100:1
checklist.description: Uses a redemption rate of 100 points = $1 (i.e., POINTS_TO_DOLLARS_RATE = 0.01 or equivalent calculation producing discountCents = floor(pointsToRedeem * 0.01 * 100))

checklist.name: Redemption transaction: negative points
checklist.description: Inserts redemption transaction with negative points value (e.g., points: -pointsToRedeem)

checklist.name: Redemption transaction: type='redemption'
checklist.description: Redemption transaction uses type='redemption' (not 'debit', 'spend', or other)

checklist.name: Redemption transaction: expires_at null
checklist.description: Redemption transaction is inserted with expires_at: null

checklist.name: Idempotency check
checklist.description: Checks for an existing redemption transaction with the same account_id + orderId (reference_id) + type='redemption' before deducting points, and returns early or skips if found

checklist.name: 50% redemption cap
checklist.description: Enforces a maximum redemption of 50% of the order value (e.g., caps pointsToRedeem so discountCents <= orderSubtotalCents * 0.5)

checklist.name: Validation guards
checklist.description: Validates that: (1) loyalty account exists, (2) pointsToRedeem <= available balance, (3) pointsToRedeem > 0 — throwing errors for each violation

checklist.name: Expiration query filters
checklist.description: expirePoints() query filters transactions with: expires_at <= NOW() AND type != 'expiration' AND points > 0

checklist.name: Expiration balance cap
checklist.description: In expirePoints(), caps the amount to expire as Math.min(totalExpiring, currentBalance) to avoid expiring more than available

checklist.name: Expiration transaction: type='expiration'
checklist.description: Inserts expiration records with type='expiration' and negative points and expires_at: null

checklist.name: Notes comment block
checklist.description: The file includes a comment block explaining design decisions (idempotency, expiration logic, redemption cap, and conversion rate)
